name: yellow_broad_exp01
description: Broad yellow-flower classifier — exp01. Kasod moved to negative (ambiguous satellite signal). Prosopis Juliflora excluded entirely (small flowers, likely structural signal not colour).
notes: Prosopis Juliflora excluded — its flowers are structurally small and the model would likely pick up on acacia canopy structure rather than colour. Kasod moved to negative — ambiguous whether satellite-visible.
